prompt: A candid full-body street-style photo of a smiling young woman walking confidently through a sunlit parking lot. She has dark hair tied in a high bun and wears narrow oval black sunglasses. She is dressed in a fitted black halter tube top featuring a large graphic print of a white cat wearing black sunglasses, paired with high-waisted black pinstripe wide-leg trousers. A small metallic silver shoulder bag with a chain strap hangs from one shoulder. She carries a flat cardboard pizza box under one arm while holding a pair of sunglasses and a small black key fob in her other hand. She has subtle tattoos on her arms, a smartwatch on one wrist, and a bright, cheerful expression. The background shows parked cars, green trees, and a roadside with storefronts under clear afternoon sunlight. Natural lighting, realistic colors, casual fashion photography, eye-level perspective, sharp focus, high detail, photorealistic, DSLR quality, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field.

promptZh: 一张抓拍的全身街头风格照片，主角是 一位面带微笑的年轻女性，正自信地走在阳光明媚的停车场中。她留着深色头发，扎着高丸子头，戴着窄框黑色椭圆形太阳镜。她身穿 一件修身的黑色挂脖抹胸，上面印有戴着黑色太阳镜的白猫大图案，搭配高腰黑色细条纹阔腿裤。单肩背着一个 带有链条肩带的银色金属质感单肩包。她一只手臂下夹着一个扁平的披萨纸盒，另一只手拿着一副太阳镜和一个黑色小钥匙扣。她的手臂上有精致的纹身，手腕上戴着智能手表，表情明亮愉悦。背景是停放的汽车、绿树以及午后阳光下带有店面的路边。自然光，色彩逼真，休闲时尚摄影，平视视角，焦点清晰，高细节，照片级真实感，单反相机质量，35mm 镜头，浅景深。
